A

ac - Variable in enum class com.hmimesh.game.Cheats
 
active(Player) - Method in enum class com.hmimesh.game.Cheats
 
ALCHEMIST - Enum constant in enum class com.hmimesh.game.Feat
 
apply(Player) - Method in enum class com.hmimesh.game.Feat
 
Armor - Class in com.hmimesh.game
Armor class for the armor the player will use modifying the ac and adding to the ac of an Entity class (currently only player)
Armor() - Constructor for class com.hmimesh.game.Armor
 
attack(int, Entity, Entity) - Static method in class com.hmimesh.game.Fight
the main attacking method using rolls of chance of d20 using 2 entities using rolls and bonuses against ac if it pass lower the defender hp according to the attack also have a crit succsus and fail if roll is 1 or 20
autoHealInFight() - Method in class com.hmimesh.game.Player
if the player is low on health check if he has any potions drink the potion and heal for the hp needed if he dosent have print that he have no potion if low on health if he dies but have revive use it and remove it from the bag

C

canBuyArmor(Armor, Scanner, Player) - Method in class com.hmimesh.game.Shop
Create an armor and check if the user have enough gold to buy it if they do check their input if they want it and change it accordingly
canBuyItem(Item, Scanner, Player) - Method in class com.hmimesh.game.Shop
create and check if the player can buy the item, if they can check their input if they want to and change it accordingly
canBuyWeapon(Weapon, Scanner, Player) - Method in class com.hmimesh.game.Shop
create and check if the player can buy the weapon if they can check their input if they want to and change it accordingly

enums for cheats to modify the game using hp, gold, modifier, dice count, ac and luck.

dmg() - Method in class com.hmimesh.game.Player
